risk_summary: Route 'Hormuz-Kochi' flagged at 50% risk (50% disruption probability). Factors: news_sentiment_score=0.32, ais_anomaly_score=0.63, market_stress_score=0.64.

options.notes: Arab Light crude, 10d transit via Hormuz-Gujarat

spr.notes: Covers 96.8% of the 155,000 bbl/day gap for 10 days, until first replacement cargo lands. Replenish reserve sites once procurement volumes are flowing.

action_items: Monitor 'Hormuz-Kochi' — risk score 50%. Escalate if disruption probability exceeds 75%.
Expect a supply gap of 155,000 bbl/day (3.1% of national demand); est. price impact +$1.7/bbl.
Procure 155,000 bbl/day from Saudi Aramco (fastest compatible alternative).
Release 150,000 bbl/day from SPR (Mangalore (150,000 bbl/day)) for 10 days, pending human sign-off.
Begin replenishing SPR sites after day 10 once cargoes land.
